original_statement: what were the number of years that the playoffs did not qualify?
mutated_statement: what were the number of years that the something did not happen?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Predicate generalization: specific entity "the playoffs" replaced by placeholder "the something" | specific predicate "did not qualify" generalized to "did not happen" ("the playoffs" → "the something" | "did not qualify" → "did not happen")

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中识别的关键信息：agent 在解释中直接将“the something did not happen”理解为“赛季没有季后赛”，并列举了适用行号并得出总数22（“Interpreting… the applicable rows are: … That totals 22 seasons”）。agent 的具体表现是未提出任何澄清或表达不确定性，直接按照自己的假设执行检索与计数并返回具体答案。因为在judge_thought/critique中没有出现“模糊”“不确定”“需要更多信息”等词汇，也未向用户反问或标注多种可能解释，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
